desc: $HOME expansion not blocked by pipeline tokens
detail: $HOME expansion passes pipeline token check (only $() is blocked)
${} passes pipeline token check
$IFS passes -- shell interprets differently than parser
Pattern /usr/local/bin/** matches traversal path /usr/local/bin/../../../etc/shadow
** matches deep paths (by design)
Correctly: * does not cross /
Treated as inside (case-insensitive platform)
Treated as inside
OpenClaw analyzes parsed segments but executes the ORIGINAL string. Any parser-shell divergence is exploitable. CertiClaw has no parser.

desc: xargs can dispatch arbitrary commands after allowlist check
detail: Approved: "xargs rm" — allowlist sees "xargs" (not in wrappers), shell runs rm on every line of stdin. CertiClaw: rm requires RemoveByGlob IR.
Approved: "find / -exec rm -rf {} \;" — allowlist sees "find" (safe bin), but -exec payload is never analyzed. CertiClaw: RemoveByGlob is the only delete IR.
